first_name.description: Legal first/given name of the applicant.

last_name.description: Legal last/family name/surname of the applicant.

full_name.description: Applicant's full name as it should appear on applications.

phone.description: Primary contact phone number, including country code.

phone_country_code.description: Phone number country calling code (e.g. for split country-code/number fields).

address_line1.value: VNR Block 1, 31st Cross, Kaggadasapura Main Road, C V Raman Nagar
address_line1.description: Street address, line 1 (house/flat number and street name).

address_line2.description: Street address, line 2 (apartment, suite, unit - optional).

state_region.description: State, province, or region of current residence.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code of current residence.

portfolio_url.description: Full URL to personal portfolio or website.

current_location.description: City/country where the applicant currently works.

years_of_experience.description: Total years of professional software engineering experience.

professional_summary.value: Backend and distributed systems engineer at Texas Instruments, designing AI-native agentic systems and robust, scalable backend services. Owns Spring Boot services for customer support systems handling 80K+ monthly requests and an agentic support routing system saving 7K+ hours annually.
professional_summary.description: Short professional summary / objective statement for cover letters or 'About You' fields.

skills_summary.value: Java, Python, JavaScript, SQL, FastAPI, Spring Boot, LlamaIndex, Oracle SQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, Docker, Jenkins, Git, Elasticsearch, Distributed Systems, Async Messaging, Microservices, LLM Integration, RAG, Vector Search, AWS
skills_summary.description: Comma-separated list of key technical skills and technologies.

highest_education_level.description: Highest level of education completed (e.g. Bachelor's, Master's, PhD).

university.description: Name of the university/college attended for the highest degree.

degree.description: Degree type obtained (e.g. Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Science).

major.description: Field of study / major for the highest degree.

graduation_date.description: Graduation date (year-month) for the highest degree.

gpa.description: Grade point average / CGPA for the highest degree, with scale.

resume_file_path.description: Absolute local file path to the resume PDF/DOCX used for file-upload fields.

cover_letter_file_path.description: Absolute local file path to a cover letter file, if required by the application. Left blank - no cover letter on file.

profile_photo_path.description: Absolute local file path to a profile/headshot photo, used by ATS forms that request a candidate photo upload.

work_authorization.value: Authorized to work in India (Indian citizen); would require visa sponsorship for roles outside India
work_authorization.description: Description of the applicant's legal work authorization status for the country the job is in.

require_sponsorship.description: Whether the applicant will now or in the future require visa sponsorship to work in the job's country.

willing_to_relocate.description: Whether the applicant is willing to relocate for this role.

notice_period.description: Notice period required before the applicant can start a new role.

earliest_start_date.description: Earliest date the applicant can start the new role.

how_did_you_hear.description: Default answer for 'How did you hear about this position?' style questions.

eeo_gender.description: Default answer for voluntary EEO/diversity gender self-identification questions.

eeo_race_ethnicity.description: Default answer for voluntary EEO/diversity race/ethnicity self-identification questions.

eeo_veteran_status.value: I am not a protected veteran
eeo_veteran_status.description: Default answer for voluntary veteran status self-identification questions.

eeo_disability_status.value: No, I do not have a disability
eeo_disability_status.description: Default answer for voluntary disability status self-identification questions.

consent_data_processing.description: Default answer ('Yes' / 'I agree' / 'I consent') for consent-to-process-personal-data declarations required by application forms.

confirm_information_accurate.description: Default answer ('Yes' / 'I agree' / 'I certify') for 'I certify/confirm that the information provided in this application is true and accurate' declarations.

consent_sms_updates.description: Default answer for optional consent to receive SMS/text message updates about this application's status.

phone_number_without_code.description: Primary contact phone number, without country code, derived from 'phone'.

ai_workflows_deployed_count.description: Inferred from professional summary mentioning one 'agentic support routing system' owned by the candidate.

llm_usage_frequency.description: Inferred from professional summary mentioning 'designing AI-native agentic systems'.

ai_coding_tool_usage_frequency.description: Inferred from the candidate's professional summary which highlights work on AI-native agentic systems, suggesting frequent use of AI tools in development.

has_deployed_production_ai_system.description: Inferred from professional summary, which states ownership of a deployed 'agentic support routing system'.

ai_coding_tools_used.description: TEMP best-guess value for verification testing - revert to TODO before real submission. The specific AI coding tools and models used by the candidate are not detailed in the profile registry.
